_comment: Formatting output eval (US-416). Golden input -> formatted output over the pure formatter core (no gst, no VS Code). Each case asserts formatSource(input, options) === expected; `options` overrides DEFAULT_FORMAT_OPTIONS. RED until server/src/format/formatter.ts ships.

cases.name: assignment spacing is normalized
keyword message spacing is normalized
binary selector gets one space each side
no space before period or semicolon
cascade segments align one per line under the receiver
cascades=preserve keeps author line breaks (spacing still normalized)
two or more blank lines collapse to one
a single blank line is preserved as an intentional separator
class body and method are indented by depth; comment preserved (tight blocks, GST style)
cases.input:
Object subclass: Foo [
| a b |
sum [ "add them" ^a + b ]
]
cases.expected:
Object subclass: Foo [
    | a b |
    sum ["add them" ^a + b]
]

cases.name: long keyword send wraps one keyword per line past the threshold
cases.input: aCollection inject: theVeryLongInitialAccumulatorValue into: [:acc :each | acc + each squared].
cases.expected:
aCollection
    inject: theVeryLongInitialAccumulatorValue
    into: [:acc :each | acc + each squared].

cases.name: short keyword send stays on one line
literal arrays and dynamic arrays keep contents, normalize spacing
indentSize override uses two spaces
already-formatted input is a fixed point (idempotence)
malformed: unterminated string is returned unchanged
malformed: unclosed block is returned unchanged
empty input yields empty output
blockStyle=expand breaks a method body onto its own lines, one statement per line
blockStyle=expand keeps single-statement argument blocks inline
blockStyle=expand puts top-level statements one per line
blockStyle=expand expands a multi-statement block; params stay on the opening line
cases.input: coll do: [:each | Transcript show: each. Transcript nl].
cases.expected:
coll do: [:each |
    Transcript show: each.
    Transcript nl
].

cases.name: blockStyle=preserve (default) keeps the author's inline method body
